examples: Methods Ictal AEEG monitoring was performed on 53 infants with paroxysmal events during clinical episodes.
Methods 11 surgical cases of children with intractable epilepsy and with ictal SPECT were retrospectively investigated.
Statistically high ei values corresponded to structures involved early in the ictal process and producing rapid discharges at seizure onset.
More severe seizures are often followed by what doctors call a "post-ictal period" of confusion and drowsiness.
